evals.prompt: Cria uma tarefa para implementar validação de email nos formulários de registo
evals.expected_output: Task with functional description explaining email validation need, technical description with regex/validation logic, acceptance criteria covering valid/invalid emails, edge cases, and error messages

evals.prompt: Preciso de uma tarefa para o plano de implementação: adicionar suporte a exportação CSV dos roadmaps
evals.expected_output: Task following IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md format with priority, dependencies, complexity, functional and technical descriptions, validation requirements, affected files, and specialists

evals.prompt: Add a task to fix the race condition in database connections
evals.expected_output: Task describing race condition problem, technical solution with mutex or channels, acceptance criteria including concurrent tests, assigned to go-elite-developer

evals.prompt: Create task: implementar autenticação JWT para proteger as APIs
evals.expected_output: Security-focused task with P0/P1 priority, assigned to red-team-hacker and go-elite-developer, covering token generation, validation, refresh, and security considerations

evals.prompt: New task - optimize the task listing query that's taking too long with many records
evals.expected_output: Performance task assigned to go-performance-advisor with benchmarking requirements, query optimization, index analysis, and performance validation criteria
